emails.body:
NIST Publication Alert Service

New publications available as of 2026-10-03:

1. NIST AI 100-2: Artificial Intelligence Risk Management Framework: Generative AI Profile (Final)
   DOI: 10.6028/NIST.AI.100-2
   Published: 2026-09-30
   https://doi.org/10.6028/NIST.AI.100-2

2. NIST SP 800-53B Rev. 1: Control Baselines for Information Systems and Organizations (Final)
   DOI: 10.6028/NIST.SP.800-53Br1
   Published: 2026-10-01
   https://doi.org/10.6028/NIST.SP.800-53Br1

3. NIST IR 8478: Cybersecurity Framework Profile for Ransomware Risk Management (Updated)
   DOI: 10.6028/NIST.IR.8478
   Published: 2026-10-02
   https://doi.org/10.6028/NIST.IR.8478

---
You are receiving this message because you subscribed to NIST publication alerts for topics: AI Risk Management, Cybersecurity Framework, Security Controls.

Manage subscriptions: https://www.nist.example/alerts/manage
Contact: updates@nist.example

NIST Publication Alert Service

Comment Period Reminders:

The following draft publications have open comment periods closing soon:

1. NIST SP 800-218A (Draft): Secure Software Development Framework (SSDF) Version 1.1 - Implementation Guidance
   Comment deadline: 2026-10-17
   Submit comments: https://www.nist.example/ssdf/comments

2. NIST AI 100-4 (Draft): AI RMF Crosswalk to ISO/IEC 42001
   Comment deadline: 2026-10-24
   Submit comments: https://www.nist.example/ai-rmf/comments

3. NIST SP 1800-35C (Draft): Validating PQC Migration in Enterprise Environments
   Comment deadline: 2026-11-07
   Submit comments: https://www.nist.example/pqc-migration/comments

---
This is an automated reminder. You will not receive additional reminders for these drafts.

Manage subscriptions: https://www.nist.example/alerts/manage
Contact: updates@nist.example
